data.name: GATE MASTER - Comprehensive Web-Based GATE Preparation Platform
data.description: A full-stack educational platform for GATE Computer Science aspirants featuring practice zones, realistic mock tests, daily challenges, performance analytics, study materials, and leaderboards — built to democratize quality education for all students.

data.name: Coastal Threat Alert System
data.description: AI-powered real-time early warning platform for India's coastal regions. Integrates live sensor data, satellite intelligence, and machine learning to detect and predict coastal threats like storms, erosion, pollution, and algal blooms.

data.name: PreetVerseX - Personal Portfolio Website
data.description: A fully responsive and animated personal portfolio built using React.js, showcasing projects, experiences, education, and open-source contributions. Deployed on GitHub Pages with smooth transitions, modern UI, and modular components.

data.name: Expense Management System with Smart Approvals
data.description: A full-stack MERN application automating expense reimbursements through multi-level approval workflows, real-time currency conversion, smart OCR-based receipt scanning, and live dashboards for employees, managers, and admins.

data.name: Image Captioning and Segmentation
data.description: A deep learning pipeline for natural language image captioning and object-level image segmentation built entirely from scratch using the MS COCO 2017 dataset — without any pre-trained models.

data.name: AgroSphere - SQL-Based Smart Agriculture System
data.description: Seeds of Change: Transforming Global Food Systems from Farm to Fork. A structured SQL-based DBMS for smart agriculture enabling traceability, sustainability tracking, and farm analytics from soil to shelf.

data.name: CyberShield - Network Vulnerability Scanner
data.description: An automated network vulnerability assessment tool that performs comprehensive port scanning, service enumeration, and security auditing. Features real-time threat detection, CVE mapping, and detailed PDF report generation.

data.name: Stock Market Prediction using LSTM
data.description: Time-series stock price prediction system using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks. Implements technical indicators, sentiment analysis from news data, and provides interactive visualization dashboards for market insights.

data.name: SecureAuth - Multi-Factor Authentication System
data.description: A robust authentication system implementing OAuth 2.0, JWT tokens, TOTP-based 2FA, and biometric verification. Features password strength analysis, brute-force protection, and comprehensive audit logging.

data.name: Digital Forensics Toolkit
data.description: A comprehensive digital forensics suite for incident response and evidence collection. Includes memory analysis, disk imaging, file recovery, metadata extraction, and chain of custody documentation features.

data.name: AI Chatbot with NLP
data.description: An intelligent conversational AI chatbot powered by natural language processing. Features intent classification, entity recognition, context-aware responses, and integration with multiple messaging platforms.

data.name: Password Cracker & Analyzer
data.description: Educational tool demonstrating password security vulnerabilities. Implements dictionary attacks, brute-force methods, rainbow table lookups, and password strength meters to promote better security practices.
